issues.description: Meta banner 'View spec' link points to an external GitHub URL that cannot be HTTP-verified in this environment
issues.actual: href resolves correctly per SEED.md context (more specific path than the base URL given) but repo existence cannot be confirmed
issues.suggestion: Verify that the rootspec/demos GitHub repository exists and the greenfield/rootspec path is accessible before launch

issues.description: CTA and Hero 'Get Started'/'View on GitHub' links point to https://github.com/rootspec/rootspec — cannot be HTTP-verified as live
issues.actual: href matches SEED.md exactly but cannot be confirmed as an active repository
issues.suggestion: Verify the rootspec/rootspec GitHub repository exists and is publicly accessible before launch

issues.description: Comparison toggle buttons lack aria-pressed state; screen reader users cannot determine which panel is currently active
issues.expected: Toggle buttons should convey active/inactive state via aria-pressed='true'/'false'
issues.actual: Buttons use visual background color only to indicate active state — no aria-pressed attribute set or updated via JavaScript
issues.suggestion: Add aria-pressed to each button and update it in the onclick handlers alongside the panel display toggling

issues.description: Emoji icons in problem cards (⚠️, 🤖, 📄, 🔄) lack aria-hidden='true', so screen readers announce them with verbose Unicode descriptions alongside the card title
issues.expected: Decorative emoji should be hidden from assistive technology since the meaning is conveyed by the adjacent title text
issues.actual: Emoji rendered as live text nodes inside a plain <div> with no aria-hidden
issues.suggestion: Wrap each icon in ⚠️ to suppress screen reader announcement

issues.description: Meta banner copy is more terse than SEED.md described. SEED.md called for messaging about '~100-line product description', 'no manual code, no design mockups', and 'four commands'
issues.expected: Banner conveying the full context per SEED.md: site generated from a sparse seed with no iteration or manual code, via four commands
issues.actual: Banner reads: 'This site was built by the RootSpec pipeline — spec-driven, AI-implemented. View spec · View SEED.md'
issues.suggestion: Optionally expand banner copy to include '~100-line seed, no manual code, four commands' to fully match SEED.md intent; current copy is functional if minimal

issues.description: Both step 1 (mission) and step 3 (key interaction) inputs share data-test='wizard-product-input', making future test targeting ambiguous
issues.expected: Each distinct input should have a unique data-test identifier
issues.actual: Step 1 mission input and step 3 interaction input both use data-test='wizard-product-input'

qualityScore.notes: Content: full marks — version reads from .rootspec.json, all four skills named, problem section has real copy, comparison has real content (no lorem ipsum), links match SEED.md. Visual: full marks — all icons render as actual emoji/symbols (no literal text), all sections visible and readable, SVG methodology diagram present and rendering. Alignment: -2 for terse meta-banner copy vs SEED.md description of what the banner should say. Accessibility: -5 for missing aria-pressed on comparison toggles and -5 for unannotated decorative emoji in problem cards (total -5, floored at 5). Polish: full marks — no template syntax visible, no TODO/placeholder artifacts in rendered output.
